title: Delhi HC rejects Pernod Ricard's plea against denial of wholesale liquor license over pending excise policy case
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday dismissed a plea filed by French wine and spirits giant Pernod Ricard challenging the Delhi government’s decision to denying it a wholesale liquor license. Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav ruled that as on date, the company has a "criminal background" as per Section 13(1)(c) of the Delhi Excise Act and is, therefore, ineligible for the grant of L-1 license.
